with sqlite3.connect(db_path) as connection:
    applied = connection.execute(
        'SELECT migration_id FROM schema_migrations ORDER BY migration_id'
    ).fetchall()
    users = connection.execute('SELECT email FROM users ORDER BY id').fetchall()
    config = connection.execute('SELECT key, value FROM app_config').fetchall()

print('APPLIED_IDS', applied)
print('USERS', users)
print('CONFIG', config)

assert applied == [('001_init',), ('002_add_users',)]
assert users == [('demo@example.com',)]
assert config == [('app_name', 'sqlite-migration-poc')]
